methods.description: Construction of a binary vector for plant transformation using various DNA manipulation techniques.

steps.description: pZK_gYSA_FFCas9 vector was digested with XbaI, the recognition site of which was located between the cauliflower mosaic virus 35S promoter and the NPTII gene, and blunted with Klenow fragment.
steps.searchable_summary: digest vector with XbaI and blunt with Klenow fragment

steps.description: About 2 kb of Zea mays ubiquitin promoter was inserted into the blunted pZK_gYSA_FFCas9 vector.
steps.searchable_summary: insert Zea mays ubiquitin promoter into blunted vector

steps.description: Two synthetic DNAs were annealed and ligated into the BbsI-digested pUC19_AtU6oligo vector.
steps.searchable_summary: anneal and ligate synthetic DNAs into BbsI-digested vector

steps.description: A derivative vector was digested with I-SceI, and DNA fragments including the oligonucleotides were excised.
steps.searchable_summary: digest derivative vector with I-SceI and excise DNA fragments

steps.description: The DNA fragments were inserted into I-SceI digested pBFGE1.
steps.searchable_summary: insert DNA fragments into I-SceI digested pBFGE1

methods.description: Transformation of sugi embryonic cell line using Agrobacterium-mediated transformation and subsequent plant regeneration.

steps.description: The sugi embryonic cell line #13-8-2 was induced from an immature seed using previously described methods.
steps.searchable_summary: induce sugi embryonic cell line from immature seed

steps.description: The #13-8-2 cells were transformed using A. tumefaciens GV3101 harboring the constructed pBFGE1 vector.
steps.searchable_summary: transform sugi cells with Agrobacterium harboring pBFGE1

steps.description: Selected kanamycin-resistant calli were regenerated through somatic embryogenesis.
steps.searchable_summary: regenerate kanamycin-resistant calli through somatic embryogenesis

steps.description: Regenerated sugi plantlets were acclimatized in moist peat moss and Kanuma pumice, then transferred to moist vermiculite in a pot.
steps.searchable_summary: acclimatize and transfer sugi plantlets to vermiculite

steps.description: They were cultivated under natural-day-length conditions in a closed glass greenhouse or a special netted-house.
steps.searchable_summary: cultivate sugi plantlets in greenhouse or netted-house

methods.description: Analysis of DNA to confirm gene presence and mutations using PCR and sequencing techniques.

steps.description: Orthologs of the CMFL003_A04 cDNA were searched using the blastn program in the latest NCBI nucleotide database.
steps.searchable_summary: search for orthologs using blastn in NCBI database

steps.description: The CjACOS5 cDNAs were cloned as described in Supplementary Information.
steps.searchable_summary: clone CjACOS5 cDNAs

steps.description: A functional domain analysis of ACOS5-related protein sequences was performed on the InterPro website.
steps.searchable_summary: perform functional domain analysis on InterPro

steps.description: Genomic DNA was isolated from embryogenic cells and from leaves using the DNeasy Plant Mini Kit.
steps.searchable_summary: isolate genomic DNA using DNeasy Plant Mini Kit

steps.description: The NPTII and CjACOS5 genes were confirmed using PCR.
steps.searchable_summary: confirm NPTII and CjACOS5 genes using PCR

steps.description: To elucidate the mutation induced by genome editing, a DNA region including the predicted DNA break site for the CRISPR/Cas9 system was amplified using PCR.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify DNA region for CRISPR/Cas9 mutation analysis using PCR

steps.description: The amplified DNA fragments were cloned into the pBlueScript II vector and sequenced.
steps.searchable_summary: clone and sequence amplified DNA fragments

methods.method_name: Induction and Observation of Male Strobili
methods.description: Induction of flowering in sugi plantlets using gibberellin treatment and observation of male strobili.

steps.description: To induce flowering, 100 mg/L of a gibberellin A3 (GA3) aqueous solution was sprayed on sugi plantlets.
steps.searchable_summary: spray GA3 solution to induce flowering in sugi plantlets

steps.description: In the first experiment, GA3 treatments were performed twice, on July 24 and August 3, 2017.
steps.searchable_summary: perform GA3 treatments on specific dates

steps.description: Male strobili were observed in January, 2018.
steps.searchable_summary: observe male strobili in sugi plantlets

steps.description: Pollen and the suspension of sliced male strobili were stained with Calberla's fuchsin staining solution, for microscopy.
steps.searchable_summary: stain pollen and strobili suspension for microscopy

steps.description: In the second and third experiments, GA3 treatments were performed in late July, 2018 and 2019, respectively.
steps.searchable_summary: perform GA3 treatments in late July for subsequent experiments

steps.description: Thereafter, male strobili and pollen were analyzed in the following year in the same way as that described for first experiment.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze male strobili and pollen in subsequent years
